ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Player's level in the game */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Player's current rank */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's avatar */,
  "location" TEXT /* Player's location (optional) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio or description of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform(s) the game is available on */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the game has received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's thumbnail or cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the player */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "action_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES game_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the level */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Average completion time for the level */,
  "required_xp" INTEGER /* XP required to unlock the level */,
  "required_items" TEXT /* Items required to unlock the level */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the level's thumbnail or image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_levels_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for achieving the rank */,
  "required_xp" INTEGER /* XP required to achieve the rank */,
  "required_kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills required to achieve the rank */,
  "required_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins required to achieve the rank */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for achieving the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ranks_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for earning the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES game_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_friends" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date when the friendship was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., accepted, pending) */,
  "last_message_timestamp" TEXT /* Last time a message was sent between friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_friends_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_friends_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the changes made in the update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the update was released */,
  "patch_size" TEXT /* Size of the patch or update */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL for downloading the update */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
